$comment: BuildReport for the curated static Review Docs example. Updated 2026-07-14 to add a Save/Discard cycle backed by localStorage (persisting the document, comments, and attachment metadata across reloads) and comment deletion, raising this from a UI demo to a minimally functional app per the app-suite CRUD/persistence/guard bar.

checkFailures.name: lint
checkFailures.detail: react-hooks/set-state-in-effect on the initial localStorage-hydration effect; resolved by consolidating title/content/comments/files into one snapshot state object (one setState call instead of four) and documenting the remaining one-time hydration setState with a scoped eslint-disable.
